subtitle.ja: 左手のひらに糸をかけて始めます。右手で左手の甲の輪を持ち、左手人差し指と小指に糸をかけながら輪を手前側に回します
subtitle.en: Begin with the string on the left palm. With the right hand hold the loop on the back of the left hand, and while placing strings on the left index and little fingers, turn the loop toward you.

subtitle.ja: 右人差し指を左小指の輪に下から入れ、左小指左の糸と左人差し指右の糸を上から取り、右手を引きます
subtitle.en: Insert the right index finger up into the left little-finger loop, move over and pick down the left little-finger left string and the left index-finger right string, and draw the right hand back.

subtitle.ja: 左手の輪に、右手を下から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert the right hand up into the left-hand loop.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指向こうの糸と左小指手前の糸を右親指と小指で握り、右手を引きます。右手を広げて完成です
subtitle.en: With the right thumb and little finger, grasp the far left index-finger string and the near left little-finger string, draw the right hand back, spread the right hand, and complete the figure.
